description: This pipeline processes image data by first splitting it based on annotations, then applying two parallel processing paths: one enhancing the contrast of 2D images using histogram normalization methods, and another projecting a 3D stack into a 2D image with extended depth of focus using a Sobel operator, before finally enhancing the contrast of the projected image.

37584424-9d11-4542-ab6a-ffa063391a12.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
37584424-9d11-4542-ab6a-ffa063391a12.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D



Please be aware that this node was generated automatically by JIPipe from existing interfaces provided by CLIJ. Please contact the JIPipe developers if you find any issues.

282f0bed-a6ec-49e6-9769-222c97af1475.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
282f0bed-a6ec-49e6-9769-222c97af1475.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

42cdf326-2860-4f73-9156-1b0a06116e05.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
42cdf326-2860-4f73-9156-1b0a06116e05.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.
